name: RIUF - Romanian International University Fair
timing_pattern: Spring 2025 Bucharest 15-16 Mar + Timisoara 18 Mar; fall run late Oct (Cluj/Iasi) + optional virtual days.
notes: Lock bundle before Jan; confirm seminar slot; align follow-up by city/campus.

name: World Education Fair (Integral)
timing_pattern: Spring leg late Feb-early Mar (Bucharest 1 Mar 2025) plus fall leg late Sep-Oct with parallel virtual day.
notes: Reserve seminar plus digital add-ons; run school visits in tour gaps; route leads via Integral CRM tags.

name: Education Beyond Borders (EBB) - Bucharest
timing_pattern: Two-day editions each spring (Mar-Apr) and fall (Oct-Nov); expect 2025 calendar release by January.
notes: Secure seminar slot; prep Romanian session; plan 72h follow-up cadence.

timing_pattern: One afternoon event in October; registration opens midsummer; typically hotel venue.

name: Integral Virtual Education Fair

notes: Set Romanian copy + proactive chat staffing; send replay and booking links within 24h.

name: Unify Study Abroad Roadshow (Romania)
timing_pattern: Agency-led open days each Mar-Apr and Oct-Nov; single-day stops with pre-registered leads.
audience_focus: Pre-registered students + parents via Unify counselors
notes: Negotiate Bucharest+Constanta bundle; share scripts with Unify advisors; plan follow-up within 24h.

name: Balkan / CEE Counselor Forums & Virtual Fairs
timing_pattern: 1-2 counselor forums per year mixing half-day virtual sessions and Bucharest/Belgrade hubs.
notes: Vet attendee lists; prioritize counselor relationship outcomes over raw leads.
